title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 24 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 24 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 24 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 24/08/2022
DCE iron ore was was shocked and keep upward all the day.The main contract closed at 716,increased of 2.65 %. Steel mills are more mainly on the sidelines, and market turnover continues to pick up.PBF at Shandong port dealt 750-755 uan/mt,increase 5yuan/mt than yesterday. PBF at Tangshan dealt 755-760 yuan/mt,keep stable compare with yesterday.
